# Festa

> Festa is an eggless home bakery in Bhayli, Vadodara, Gujarat, India. We bake fresh birthday cakes, fruit cakes, brownies and tea cakes to order. Orders are placed over WhatsApp at +91 99631 63227.

## Key facts

- Business: Festa (home bakery)
- Location: Bhayli, Vadodara, Gujarat 391410, India
- Specialty: 100% eggless cakes, brownies, tea cakes
- Order channel: WhatsApp +91 99631 63227
- Lead time: 48 hours minimum; 3–5 days for custom / theme cakes
- Delivery: Pickup from Bhayli preferred; third-party delivery within Vadodara at customer cost
- Pricing: Standard cakes from ₹650 / 500g; quote on WhatsApp
- Diets: Eggless always; sugar-free on request; vegan for select flavours with notice

## Flavours

Chocolate truffle, fresh fruit, red velvet, pineapple, butterscotch, coffee, vanilla, seasonal fruit cakes, brownies, tea cakes.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand story, specialties, how to order
- [FAQ](/faq): Full list of frequently asked questions in plain text
- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of pages

## Contact

WhatsApp: +91 99631 63227
City: Vadodara, Gujarat, India
